THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT 1111 GREEN,LLC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SMAJLOVIC, DENIS $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.00, THE COURT CONSIDERED THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY MR. SMAJLOVIC ON APPEAL AND FINDS IT INSUFFICIENT TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING RESPONDENT 1111 GREEN NOT ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2025 - NO APPEARANCES FOR PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER, DENIS SMAJLOVIC; APPEARANCES FOR DEFENDANT 1111 GREEN, LLC. - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON NOV-12-2025 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624, JUDGE SHARON REARDON. (D206)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2025 - CONTINUED TO DEC-03-2025 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMAJLOVIC, DENIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 1111 GREEN,LLC PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT OR ITS AGENTS COMMITTED ANY ACTS DEFINED IN SFRO 37.10B "IN BAD FAITH." A GENUINE LEGAL ISSUE EXISTED RE THE CONTINUED VALIDITY OF PLAINTIFF'S SUBTENANCY AFTER DEFENDANT TERMINATED ITS RELATIONSHIP WITH THE MASTER TENANT IN 2023. DEFENDANT RETURNED PLAINTIFF'S RENT CHECKS FOR SEVERAL MONTHS WHILE THE PARTIES WERE NEGOTIATING HOW TO MOVE FORWARD. PLAINTIFF WAS UNCOMMUNICATIVE AND OFTEN FAILED TO COOPERATE IN RESOLVING THE DISPUTE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
